calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Michael Carrillo Hall, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Donna Brorby.
Kristin Cornuelle, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: Timothy K. Chapman.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 207.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for settlement and entry of Judgment", which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
